g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the Frontend ALB')
sendPrompt('What does the Frontend service do?')
sendPrompt('What is the Backend ALB role?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Catalogue service')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the User service')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Cart service')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Shipping service')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Payment service')
sendPrompt('Why does Cart also use Redis?')

g.text: 1. frontend_alb_public: Internet (0.0.0.0/0) → Frontend ALB on port 443
2. frontend_frontend_alb: Frontend ALB → Frontend Service on port 80
3. backend_alb_frontend: Frontend → Backend ALB on port 80
4. catalogue_backend_alb: Backend ALB → Services on port 8080
